opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel like I'm having a heart attack, I can't breathe, and if anyone finds out who I really am, my life is over.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It got much worse tonight — my heart is pounding, I'm drenched in sweat and shaking, and I can't make myself leave the house.

symptom_narrative.onset: a long-standing background worry that got dramatically worse over the last 24 hours, peaking tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: the acute episode has been building for about a day and is severe right now
symptom_narrative.character: pounding, racing heart with a feeling I can't get a proper breath; chest feels tight like something terrible is happening
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — completely overwhelming
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest and throat, whole-body sweating and shaking
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it flared up, comes in waves of terror
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped; sitting in the dark with the blinds shut a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about my phones ringing, or anyone asking me questions about my background
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sweating a lot, hands trembling, feeling on edge and watchful, can't sit still
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had this low-level dread for years but never a full attack like tonight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't leave the house, I've locked everything up and I feel like I can't function at all

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: describes years of carefully guarding personal information and keeping parts of life separate; an unexpected question from a colleague about my background yesterday set this off; exhausted from keeping it all managed and frightened of anyone finding out

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened, hypervigilant, pauses before answering personal questions, guarded about identifying details

reluctance_topics: reasons behind the fear of being found out
how bad the hopeless thoughts have become

access_barriers.other: profound reluctance to seek or document care for fear of a record of their circumstances; currently unable to leave home

objective_data_offered.value: my heart is racing and pounding really fast
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's felt sensation, not a counted or device-measured pulse

objective_data_offered.value: visibly sweating and pale, hands trembling, cannot sit still and keeps pacing
I feel like I can't take a full breath
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective breathlessness; no oximeter or respiratory-rate device available
